li.div: BRING THE LATEST TO YOUR INBOX

form.p: The information collected is used to send you newsletters, targeted information regarding Makita® products, and information about events in your area. This contact information is shared with a third-party vendor used to disseminate emails, but will not be shared or sold to any other third-party.
